EquipmentBooking.title: Equipment Booking
EquipmentBooking.description: A record of an equipment booking for a specific date and slot.

slotId.description: Identifier for the specific equipment or time slot (e.g., 'Camera 1')

bookingType.description: Type of booking (e.g., Portfolio, Product Photography)

picContact.description: Point of Contact phone or email

createdAt.description: Server timestamp of when the booking was made
